description: Language support for GON (Glaiel Object Notation) files.
configuration.gonHighlighter.enable.desc: Enable the GON language server. Requires a window reload to take effect.
configuration.gonHighlighter.enableDiagn: Enable GON syntax error diagnostics (uses the language server).
configuration.gonHighlighter.enableOutli: Enable populating GON document outlines (uses the language server).
